productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Navy Blue Polo T-shirt
description: Style NoteIf you love to stay dry, fresh and comfortable, there's no better way than with this polo T-shirt from adidas. Engineered to wick away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable, this tee fits neatly along the contours of your body, providing you with a snug Fit. Wear it to the gym or the Sports club, or simply pair it with jeans and casual footwear for a relaxed look.Product DetailsNavy blue polo T-shirt, has short sleeves, buttoned chest placket, printed brand name and logo on the left chest, engineered with climacool technology, panels on the sides and adidas three patented stripes on the shouldersMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeCool iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6', chest 33") is wearing a size M
